title: Crispy Chinese Chicken Stamppot
description: A twist on traditional stamppot, this Chinese-inspired dish features crispy chicken and a side of steamed vegetables.

ingredients.name: stamppot
ingredients.notes: see note for homemade stamppot recipe

instructions: In a large bowl, toss the chicken pieces with melted butter, flaky sea salt, and dutch paprika until evenly coated.
Spread the chicken out in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, steam the stamppot according to package instructions.
Once the chicken is done, toss it with chopped scallions and serve over steamed stamppot.
Garnish with additional scallions and flaky sea salt if desired.
